targets.expr: sum by(handler) (http_requests_total{job="genai-service", status=~"2.*", handler!="/metrics"}) / sum by(handler) (http_requests_total{job="genai-service", handler!="/metrics"})
sum by(handler) (http_requests_total{job="genai-service", status=~"5.*", handler!="/metrics"}) / sum by(handler) (http_requests_total{job="genai-service", handler!="/metrics"})

panels.description: The percent of time spent on Garbage Collection over all CPUs assigned to the JVM process.
panels.title: GC Pressure
